text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Reporting diagnostic results—minor damage.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The probability of worsening is low, but... I have
determined that I'm still capable of physical
activity if I successfully keep my power in check.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Requesting permission to continue with training. I
will successfully complete today's tasks.
choice_data_list: I'm worried about you, so let's take a break.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Requesting permission to continue with training. I
will successfully complete today's tasks.
choice_data_list: I'm worried about you, so let's take a break.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: You're... worried?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Order acknowledged. I apologize for causing you
concern.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Commencing operation—"recuperating to avoid
causing you concern."

And so, Mihono Bourbon rests to recover from
her injury.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Commencing
operation—"continuation of limited-strength
training."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Restricting power output in consideration of the
damaged body part.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: First, I'll try fifty percent power output!
Thud!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pain in... damaged area... confirmed...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I apologize. Even at 50% power output... my
injury seems to have been irritated.

Realizing that any exercise will just make her
condition worse, I advise her to rest quietly.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
No pain at fifty percent output. Threshold
cleared. Next is fifty-five percent!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Reporting. I have verified that I am capable of
training at up to sixty-five percent power output.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I propose revising our training regimen based
upon this data.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I will show you that I can reliably execute any
regimen I am given.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It is all for you, for instructing me and believing
that I could successfully limit my power output.

Making an immediate comeback, Mihono
Bourbon succeeds in limiting her power and fully
completes the revised regimen!
